title: Repair mobile chat TypeScript regressions
description: Fix syntax and type errors introduced in recent mobile chat UI work so the workspace compiles again and the chat activity/status components can be validated safely.

title: Normalize chat event stream imports
description: Keep the newer /api/chat-events SSE route aligned with existing auth and chat-event-bus modules so session-filtered activity streams type-check and remain authenticated.

title: Harden sister picker keyboard behavior
description: Make the sister picker trigger use a real ref and keyboard handler instead of overloading click handlers, preserving accessibility without type errors.

title: Clean stale untracked workspace scratch files
description: Review backup files and one-off fix scripts left in the workspace root and chat directories, then either remove them or codify them as tracked utilities.
